titleStmt.title: SII 34.45: original edition by Y. Subbarayalu
No. 45. Tiruppanandāḷ, Kumbakonam Taluk, Thanjavur District. On the south wall of the first prākāra of the Arjunajaṭēśvara temple.

summary.p: Chōḻa, Parakēsarivarman Rājarāja II, •••, Makara, badi 10, Monday, Viśāka = A.D. 1146-73.

Gift of land in the northern hamlet called Āṉaipōki by the sabhā of some neighbour village (name lost) in Miḻalai-nāḍu in Virudarāja-bhayaṅkara-vaḷanāḍu for opening a road, called Rājagambīran through which the god of Tiruppaṉandāḷ temple had to be taken in procession to the river Koḷḷiḍam on festive days. Detailed measurements of the road are given. The sabha also arranged to plant 750 coconut saplings on both sides of the road. Nearly eighty Brāhmaṇa members of the sabhā have signed the document.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrīpūmaruviya tirumātum puvimātum ceyamātum nāmaruviya kalaimātum puka[ḻmātum nayantu pulka Arumaṟaiviti neṟiyaṉaittun taḻaippa varumuṟai Urimaiyil maṇimuṭi veṇ ticaikaḷiṟeṭṭun taṅkutanikkūṭan tānena viḷaṅkak karuṅkalippaṭṭiyaic ceṅkOl turappap poruṅ tavara villavari navar ciṅkaḷar pallavar taliyar pāttivar paṇiya Eṇṇaruṅ kaṟpil maṇṇakam puṇantu cempon vīrasiṅkāsanattup puvana muḻutuṭaiyāḷOṭum vīṟṟiruntaruḷiya kOpparakEcari panmarāna tiripuvanac cakkaravatti [rājarājatE] var makara nāyaṟṟu Aparapakṣa[ ttu da] śami
yum tiṅkaṭkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa vicākattu nāḷ virutarāja payaṅkara vaḷanāṭṭu miḻalaināṭṭu yār Eḻuttu Innāṭṭu maṇṇināṭṭu tiruppaṉantāḷ Uṭaiyār ti ṭakai mu tēvarkaṉmiyuṅ kōyiṟ kaṇakkanuṅ kaṇṭu Ittēvar tirunāḷil koḷḷiṭattilē tīrttampirasātikka munpilāṇṭukaḷ Eḻuntaruḷumaṭattu tiruvītiyaṉṟikke Eḻuntaruḷukai Aritānamaiyil tīrttam pirasātikka Eḻuntaruḷukaikku nāṅkaḷ rājagampīranennun tirunāmattāl viṭṭa tiruvītikku Ikkōyilil Āticaṇṭēśvaradevar śrīpātattilē nīrvārttuk kuṭuttōm nilam Ivvūr vaṭapiṭākai Āṉaipōkiyil caṇṭē
śvaravatikkuk kiḻakkuc cantiracEkara vāykkālukku vaṭakku Āṟāṅ kaṇṇāṟṟum Eḻāṅ kaṇṇāṟṟum Iraṇṭāñ catirattum mūṉṟāñ catirattum nālāñ catirattum maṇṇikku vaṭakarai rāl Ellai kiḻācaṟuttuṭan mukko kaṇṭu mEṟku nOkki Uṭaiyār tiruvāppāṭi Uṭaiyār tirunantavanam maṇṇikku vaṭakaraippaṭṭa cEramān tOḻan tirunantavanaṅ kīḻācaṟutiyuṟap pannīraṭik kOlāl nīḷaṅ kOl muṉnūṟṟaṟupattEḻu Itil mEṟkaṭaiya Uṭaiyār tiruvāppāṭi Uṭaiyār tirunāḷil koḷḷiṭattilE tīrttam pirasātikka Eḻuntaruḷa nāṅkaḷ viṭṭa rājagampīran tiruvītiyāl nīṅkuṅ kOl muṉṉūṟu nīkki kOl mūnnū
ṟṟiṟupattu nālukkut talaiyakalam Oru paṭat tenvaṭa lakalaṅ kōl kuḻi Āyirattu raṇṭināl nilam Araiyē mukkāṇik kīḻmukkāṇi nilam Araiyē mu raikkāṇikkīḻ mukkālu Ittēvaṟ vītīyākavum Iraṇṭarukum vaikkaikku vēṇṭum teṅkaṅkaṉṟu Eḻunūṟṟaimpatu Ikkaṉṟu 7 100 5 10 m Eṅkaḷ pakkal kaikkoṇṭu ttu rakṣittut tiruviḷakkeṇṇai Uḷḷiṭṭa kōyilaḻivukkuk koḷḷak kaṭavatākavum Uṭaiyār tiruvāppāṭi Uṭaiyār tīrttam pirasātikka Eḻuntaruḷa nāṅkaḷ viṭṭa rājagampīran tiruvītiyālē koḷḷiṭamēṟa vaṭakku nōkki It tiruttāṭakai yīśvaramuṭaiyār
tīrttam piracātikka Eḻuntaruḷakkaṭavatā Ippaṭi Innilam Araiyē mukkāṇi Arai �lum rājagampīrantiruvītiyāka viṭṭōm Innilam kaikkoṇṭu naṅkaṉṟu Eḻu vaittu rakṣittu t tiruviḷakkeṇṇai Uḷḷiṭṭa kōyilaḻivuk
kuṭalākak koḷḷappaṇṇuka Innilam Araiyē mukkā ṇik kīḻmukkālum candirātitta varai kācu koḷḷā viṟaiyiliyāka viṭṭōm Ippaṭi ceyappaṇṇuka paṇiyāl Ivai vūrkkaṇakku Ilaṅkuṭaiyān tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyān Āḷuṭaiyānēn Ivai En Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai karuvuṇāyakan Aṅkacittan Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku cā
tavētan palattamut ḻuttu Ippaṭikku kaviṇṭan parañcōti mātēva paṭṭa ttu Ippaṭikku nilattu vai E marā ccavaṟ Attiri yēn Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku ravintan cēntan Eñ tti paṭṭasōmaiyāci Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Atti ttan mahēśvarapaṭṭan Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai kaviṇiyan tēvan tirucciṟṟampala bhaṭṭan Eḻuttu
Ippaṭikku Ivai mā ntai nārāyaṇan Āḷuṭaiyān paṭṭan jrai maikkuk kaviṇiya ṇan śrīkṛkṣaṇan Eḻuttu kucciṟṟampala muṭaiyāṉ Ampalattamutu paṭṭan Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai �vaṟkan nakkan tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyān Uṭaiya piḷḷai paṭṭaṉaṅkacittan Eḻuttu Ippaṭi Aṟivēn ka tan poṟkolācēvakapaṭṭan Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai Eñcava vai nārāyaṇapaṭṭan Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai Eñca ṟkan Ampalattamutu cātavētapaṭṭan Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai kaviṇiyan caṇṭēśvara Ūr naṭṭaperumāḷ Eḻuttu
Ippaṭikku Ivai �yan parañcoti śaṇṭēśvarapaṭṭa Aṅka cittan Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai yajñavaṟkan tiruvira bhaṭ ciṟṟampalamuṭaiyān paṭṭan Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai kaviṇiyan Ānantak kūttan civēta vanavāci Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai Anapāyan Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Eñcavaṟkan cātavētan nakkaṉ tillai nāyaka paṭṭa Aṅkicittan Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai cakulāvinta centa Eḻuttu Ivai Eñcavaṟkan tirukkaḻippālaiya Uṭaiyān paṭṭan Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai cakulāvintan nīlakaṇṭan Ēṟan Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai E
ñcavaṟkan ṭanēn Ivai En Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai mahādeva paṭṭa kku nīlakaṇṭa vētan Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai kaviṇiyan tēvantapaṭṭa sōmaiyāci Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai nakkan tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyān Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai Eñcavaṟkan cātavētan tirucciṟṟampala muṭaiyān Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai Eñcavaṟkan cātavēta nārāyaṇa Ippaṭikku Ivai vātucēvarāṇattan Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai kaviṇiyan nīlakaṇṭan śrīkṛṣṇa- n Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai tillai vanamuṭaiyān
tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyān Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai canti piccāṇṭān Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai kaviṇiyan cāttan cātavētan parañcōtiyēn Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai Eñcavaṟkan cuppiramaṇṇiyan nīlakaṇṭanēn Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai kaviṇiyan tirumalaiyuṭaiyān nārāyaṇan Ippaṭikku Ivai kaviṇiyan māṭān kumārapaṭṭan Eḻuttu paṭṭa Aṅkacittar saṅjñai tana ṭaikkuk kaviṇiyan māṭāna poṟku Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Aṟivaṉ Eñcavaṟkan tiraṉ nārāyaṇapaṭṭa cōmā
yēṉ kaviṇiyaṉ kanaka sabhāpati periyatēva paṭṭanēn Eḻuttu k kaviṇiyan caṇṭēcvara cuppiramaṇṇiyan Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai kaviṇiyaṉ cantirāpaṉ yātanmaikkuk kaviṇiyaṉ tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyān nārāyaṇan Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai vaṟkaṉ nārāyaṇan parañcōti paṭṭan Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai yan cōlai paṭṭa cōmāci Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai kaviṇiyan ka ṉāyakanmaheśvara paṭṭa Ippaṭikku Ivai Eñcavaṟkan pinākapāṇi tillai nāyakapaṭṭa cōmāci
maikkuk kaviṇiyan caṇṭēśvaran cuppiramaṇṇiyan Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku pāratāya Amutu yāna saṅjñaiyātanamaikku Ivai kaviṇiyan cuppiramaṇiyan Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai Eñcavaṟka nārāyaṇaṉ para ñcōtipaṭṭa cōmayāci Eḻuttu laṅ vantan Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai kavaṇiyan parañcōti ye ṅa tipaṭṭa Aṅkicittan Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai vaṟ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku n kavi ra cciṟṟampalamuṭaiyā caṇṭēśvarar Eḻuttu Ippaṭi tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyān Eḻuttu Ippaṭi cuppiramaṇṇiya
n kaviṇiyan caṇṭēśvaran tirunaṭṭapperumāḷ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai kaviṇiyan nakkan parañcōtipaṭṭa sōmaiyāci saṅjñaiyātanmaikkuk kaviṇiyan tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyān cantirāparaṇan Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku śakulā ntan tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiya Āṭkoṇṭa tēvan Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku kaviṇiya nakka paṭṭan Aṅkicittan Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai kaviṇiyan Ampalattamutu tillaināyakan Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Eñcavaṟkan tēvan kūttāṭum pirāṉ saṅjñaiyātanmaikku Āḷuṭaiyāṉ Eḻuttu Itu kaviṇiyan caṇṭēśvarattillai nāyakan saṅjñaiyātanmaikkuk kaviṇiyan Ampalattamutu tillai nāyākan Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku tēvan Eḻuttu sātavētapaṭṭasyavaina tattan saṅjñaiyātanmaikku t tiruva tan Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai śrītarapaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu
yānapa ḻuttu Ippaṭikkuk kaviṇayan tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyān kunikkumpirān Eḻuttu Ivai kaviṇiyan nārāyaṇan maṇṇikkarai maru Ippaṭikku Ivai cakulāvantan mahātēvan cēntapaṭṭa Aṅkicittan Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai pāratāyan tirumannuvān śrī[haraka] n Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Itu tillai mūvāyira nampi saṅjñaiyātanmaikkuc cantirale Uṭaiyān tillai n Eḻuttu Itu pūmuṭivānampi saṅjñaiyātanmaikku kunikkumpirān Eḻuttu Itu kaviṇiyan śrīkaṇṭan tirukkaḻippālai Uṭaiyān saṅjñaiyātanmaikku Uṭaiyān Eḻuttu Itu parātāyan Eñcavarkan maticūtana saṅjñai yātanmaikkuk kaviṇiyan maṇṇikkaṇama runtin Eḻuttu Itu kaviṇiya nakkan Aṇiyu pārata saṅjñaiyāta
vinta kan saṅjñaiyātanmaikkum Ippaṭikkum ca vittan tēvan Uyyakkoṇṭān Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai ke ṟampalamuṭaiyān tiruveṇkāṭuṭaiyān Eḻuttu Ippaṭi Aṟivēn kaviṇiyan cēntan tāmōtirapaṭṭan Eḻuttu Itu kaviṇiyan vā cēvāraṇan tirucciṟṟamapalamuṭaiyān saṅjñaiyātanmaikku Ivai tēvan Uyyakkoṇṭān Eḻuttu §
Digital edition of SII 34.45 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
